papers.title_en: MRI-based interpretable deep learning radiomics for predicting treatment response in axial spondyloarthritis
papers.tldr: 针对轴性脊柱关节炎（axSpA）患者在使用肿瘤坏死因子抑制剂（TNFi）治疗时存在的高无应答率问题，本研究开发并验证了一种基于MRI的可解释深度学习影像组学（DLR）模型。该模型旨在通过治疗前的MRI影像数据，精准预测患者对TNFi治疗的反应，为临床制定个性化治疗方案提供决策支持，具有重要的临床应用价值。
papers.abstract_en: Background The clinical efficacy of tumor necrosis factor inhibitors (TNFi) in axialspondyloarthritis (axSpA) is limited by high non-response rates, necessitatingaccurate pre-treatment stratification. This study aimed to develop and validate MRI …

papers.title_en: AC-MIL: Weakly Supervised Atrial LGE-MRI Quality Assessment via Adversarial Concept Disentanglement
papers.tldr: 本研究针对心房颤动管理中LGE-MRI图像质量易受运动、呼吸及采集时机影响的问题，提出了一种名为AC-MIL的弱监督质量评估框架。该方法通过对抗性概念解耦与多实例学习（MIL）相结合，能够从仅有弱标签的数据中有效识别高质量扫描。该研究的主要贡献在于解决了医学影像质量评估中对精细标注的依赖，提升了临床工作流的效率。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract High-quality Late Gadolinium Enhancement (LGE) MRI can be helpful foratrial fibrillation management, yet scan quality is frequently compromised by patientmotion, irregular breathing, and suboptimal image acquisition timing. While Multiple …

papers.title_en: Support vector machine‐based MRI radiomics predict response to neoadjuvant therapy and progression‐free‐survival of Colorectal Liver Metastases patients
papers.tldr: 本研究针对结直肠癌肝转移（CRLM）患者新辅助治疗（NAT）疗效及预后评估不明确的问题，开发了基于MRI影像组学的支持向量机（SVM）预测模型。通过提取MRI影像特征并结合机器学习算法，研究构建了两个分别用于预测NAT反应和无进展生存期（PFS）的模型。结果表明，该影像组学方法能有效进行风险分层，为CRLM患者的个体化治疗方案制定和预后评估提供了重要的影像学依据。
papers.abstract_en: Background The efficacy of neoadjuvant therapy (NAT) and surgical prognosisstratification in patients with colorectal cancer liver metastasis (CRLM) remainunclear. Purpose This study aims to develop and validate two radiomics models …

papers.title_en: Adaptive Personalized Federated Learning for left atrium segmentation from LGE CMR images
papers.tldr: 本研究针对心房颤动管理中左心房（LA）分割面临的数据隐私和异质性挑战，提出了一种自适应个性化联邦学习（APFL）框架。该方法通过在保护隐私的前提下整合多中心LGE CMR图像数据，并利用个性化策略应对不同机构间的领域偏移，显著提升了分割的准确性与鲁棒性，为多中心医学影像协作提供了有效方案。
papers.abstract_en: Automatic and accurate segmentation of the left atrium (LA) from late gadolinium-enhanced cardiac magnetic resonance (LGE CMR) images is crucial for atrialfibrillation (AF) management. However, data privacy and heterogeneity pose …

papers.title_en: SycoPhantasy: Quantifying Sycophancy and Hallucination in Small Open Weight VLMs for Vision-Language Scoring of Fantasy Characters
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了小型开源视觉语言模型（VLM）在评估奇幻角色图像与文本描述一致性时的可靠性。通过构建SycoPhantasy基准，研究量化了模型在评分过程中的阿谀奉承（Sycophancy）和幻觉（Hallucination）现象。研究发现，这些模型在面对带有偏见的提示词时容易给出不公正的评分，揭示了其作为自动评估工具的局限性，并为提升VLM的鲁棒性提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed as evaluators in tasksrequiring nuanced image understanding, yet their reliability in scoring alignmentbetween images and text descriptions remains underexplored. We investigate …

papers.title_en: Marco-MoE: Open Multilingual Mixture-of-Expert Language Models with Efficient Upcycling
papers.tldr: Marco-MoE 是一系列开源的多语言稀疏专家混合（MoE）模型。该研究针对多语言处理需求，通过高效的“上循环”（Upcycling）技术构建模型。其核心特点是极高的稀疏性，每个输入 token 仅激活约 5% 的参数，在保持高性能的同时显著降低了推理计算开销，为开源多语言大模型提供了高效且低成本的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: We present Marco-MoE, a suite of fully open multilingual sparse Mixture-of-Experts(MoE) models. Marco-MoE features a highly sparse design in which only around 5\%of the total parameters are activated per input token. This extreme sparsity, combined …

papers.title_en: HealthBench Professional: Evaluating Large Language Models on Real Clinician Chats
papers.tldr: 随着临床医生频繁使用ChatGPT辅助医疗，评估大模型在真实对话中的表现变得至关重要。本研究推出了HealthBench Professional，这是一个专注于真实临床医生与模型交互的开放式基准测试。该基准涵盖了最常见的临床使用场景，旨在解决现有评估缺乏真实交互数据的问题，为衡量和优化医疗大模型的实际应用能力提供了关键的评估框架。
papers.abstract_en: Millions of clinicians use ChatGPT to support clinical care, but evaluations of themost common use cases in model-clinician conversations are limited. We introduceHealthBench Professional, an open benchmark for evaluating large language …

papers.title_en: GIFT: Guided Fine-Tuning and Transfer for Enhancing Instruction-Tuned Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对指令微调语言模型在特定任务适配中的局限性，提出了GIFT（引导式微调与迁移）框架。该方法旨在解决现有模型合并技术中基座模型与指令模型相互独立的问题，通过在微调过程中引入引导机制，将基座模型学习到的任务特定知识更有效地迁移至指令模型中。实验证明，GIFT不仅显著提升了模型在目标任务上的性能，还较好地保留了其通用的指令遵循能力，为大语言模型的高效适配提供了新途径。
papers.abstract_en: A promising paradigm for adapting instruction-tuned language models is to learntask-specific updates on a pretrained base model and subsequently merge them intothe instruction-tuned model. However, existing approaches typically treat the …

papers.title_en: InfoLaw: Information Scaling Laws for Large Language Models with Quality-Weighted Mixture Data and Repetition
papers.tldr: 本研究提出了 InfoLaw，一种针对大语言模型预训练中质量加权混合数据和重复数据的缩放法则。研究背景在于，虽然增加高质量数据权重能提升性能，但在数据有限且过度训练的情况下，过度重复会导致性能下降。本文通过引入质量权重和重复惩罚项，构建了能更准确预测模型性能的缩放模型，为优化预训练数据策略提供了理论指导。
papers.abstract_en: Upweighting high-quality data in LLM pretraining often improves performance, but indatalimited regimes, especially under overtraining, stronger upweighting increasesrepetition and can degrade performance. However, standard scaling laws do not …

papers.title_en: RLearner-LLM: Balancing Logical Grounding and Fluency in Large Language Models via Hybrid Direct Preference Optimization
papers.tldr: 针对大语言模型在知识密集型任务中因直接偏好优化（DPO）导致的“冗长偏好”和逻辑欠缺问题，本文提出 RLearner-LLM。该方法通过混合直接偏好优化（Hybrid DPO）策略，结合逻辑接地性与语言流畅度，旨在减少模型对冗长回复的盲目追求，提升生成内容的准确性与逻辑严密性，为强化学习对齐提供了更平衡的优化方案。
papers.abstract_en: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), the efficient alternative to PPO-based RLHF,falls short on knowledge-intensive generation: standard preference signals fromhuman annotators or LLM judges exhibit a systematic verbosity bias that rewards …

papers.title_en: Implicit Representations of Grammaticality in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了预训练语言模型中语法性与似然度之间的关系。虽然语言模型以最大化似然度为训练目标，但其生成的文本具有高度的语法正确性。研究者通过分析模型的内部表示，探究其是否隐式地学习了独立于概率的语法概念。研究证明了模型内部存在能够区分语法正确性的表征，为理解模型如何内化语言规则提供了重要证据。
papers.abstract_en: Grammaticality and likelihood are distinct notions in human language. Pretrainedlanguage models (LMs), which are probabilistic models of language fitted tomaximize corpus likelihood, generate grammatically well-formed text and …

papers.title_en: The autoPET3 Challenge--Automated Lesion Segmentation in Whole-Body PET/CT-Multitracer Multicenter Generalization
papers.tldr: 本研究报告了MICCAI 2024第三届autoPET挑战赛的设计与结果，重点关注全身PET/CT自动病灶分割在多示踪剂和多中心环境下的组合泛化能力。该挑战赛利用包含1,014例[18F]-FDG等示踪剂的大规模数据集，为评估算法在复杂临床场景中的鲁棒性提供了标准化基准，显著推动了医学影像自动分割技术向跨中心、多任务应用的发展。
papers.abstract_en: We report the design and results of the third autoPET challenge (MICCAI 2024),which benchmarked automated lesion segmentation in whole-body PET/CT under acompositional generalization setting. Training data comprised 1,014 [18F]-FDG …

papers.title_en: CXR-ContraBench: Benchmarking Negated-Option Attraction in Medical VLMs
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医疗视觉语言模型（VLM）在胸部X光片诊断中出现的“否定选项吸引”现象，即模型在面对存在病变时反而选择否定选项的极性反转问题，提出了CXR-ContraBench基准测试。该研究旨在评估和分析模型在处理否定逻辑时的鲁棒性，揭示了当前模型在临床决策中潜在的极性误判风险，为提升医疗AI的逻辑可靠性提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: When a chest X-ray shows consolidation but the question asks which finding ispresent, a medical vision-language model may answer" No consolidation." This ismore than an incorrect choice: it is a polarity reversal that emits a clinical statement …

papers.title_en: The Granularity Axis: A Micro-to-Macro Latent Direction for Social Roles in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了大语言模型（LLM）如何在其内部表示中编码社会角色的粒度（从微观个体到宏观机构）。研究者发现了一个从微观到宏观的潜在方向（粒度轴），证明了模型不仅能扮演特定角色，还能在内部区分角色的社会层级。这一发现为理解和控制LLM的社会角色扮演能力提供了新的视角。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) are routinely prompted to take on social rolesranging from individuals to institutions, yet it remains unclear whether their internalrepresentations encode the granularity of such roles, from micro-level individual …

papers.title_en: Beyond Fixed Benchmarks and Worst-Case Attacks: Dynamic Boundary Evaluation for Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对现有大语言模型评估中固定基准测试导致的“天花板”和“地板”效应，提出了动态边界评估方法。该方法不再对所有模型使用统一题目，而是通过动态调整难度来寻找每个模型的能力边界，从而更精准地揭示模型间的性能差异，为理解模型真实能力提供了更具信息量的评估信号。
papers.abstract_en: Evaluating large language models (LLMs) today rests on fixed benchmarks thatapply the same set of items to any model, producing ceiling and floor effects thatmask capability gaps. We argue that the most informative evaluation signal lies at the …
